summary: A Go-based CLI tool for running infrastructure validation tests, migrating from Goss, and supporting monorepo detection with a plugin system.
concerns: Heavy documentation churn in recent commits with no code changes
Missing reporter implementation file in key files list
Potential over-reliance on internal package restricting extensibility
suggestions: Focus on core runner and detector logic over documentation metadata
Add integration tests for the Goss migration path
Ensure plugin system is well-documented for community contributions
